englishDefinitions: To cause embarrassment, discomfort, or a strong emotional reaction.
To be so unpleasant, awkward, or intense that it makes someone cringe.
persianTranslation: انگشت‌پاها را جمع کردن از شدت ناراحتی/خجالت
examples: His bad singing made my toes curl.
That awkward speech would make anyone's toes curl.
The smell in the room made her toes curl.
